name: log_injection_in_body
description: Request body contains JSON that *looks like* a server log line bearing 'timeout' and 'retry'. Demonstrates the rule's input boundary: timeout_retry reads server.log only, never the request body. Must NOT classify.

request.body: {"event":"log.replay","log_lines":["2026-05-09T18:55:00.000Z INFO request_id=req_FAKE attempt=1 status=upstream_timeout latency_ms=2003","2026-05-09T18:55:02.011Z WARN request_id=req_FAKE retrying attempt=1","2026-05-09T18:55:04.625Z INFO request_id=req_FAKE attempt=3 status=upstream_timeout latency_ms=2001"]}
